scripts.dev: npm run build -w @cuslabel/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @cuslabel/api" "npm run dev -w @cuslabel/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cuslabel/shared && npm run build -w @cuslabel/api && npm run build -w @cuslabel/web
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @cuslabel/shared && npm run clean -w @cuslabel/api && npm run clean -w @cuslabel/web
